languages.text: Сейчас ложе Патента пустует — молчаливое свидетельство страшного богохульства против династии фон Валанциус.

traits.locale_text: Сейчас ложе Патента пустует — молчаливое свидетельство страшного богохульства против династии фон Валанциус.

languages.text: The Warrant dais is now empty, a silent testimony to the terrible sacrilege committed against the von Valancius dynasty.
languages.original_text: Сейчас ложе Патента пустует — молчаливое свидетельство страшного богохульства против династии фон Валанциус.

traits.locale_text: The Warrant box is now empty, a silent testimony to the terrible sacrilege committed against the von Valancius dynasty.

The Warrant dais is now empty, a silent testimony to the terrible sacrilege committed against the von Valancius dynasty.

languages.text: 贸易授状台座如今空空如也，默默见证着冯·瓦兰修斯王朝所遭受的可怕亵渎。
languages.original_text: The Warrant dais is now empty, a silent testimony to the terrible sacrilege committed against the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: 贸易授状台座如今空空如也，默默见证着冯·瓦兰修斯王朝所遭受的可怕亵渎。

languages.text: El pedestal de la Patente está vacío, un testimonio silente del espantoso sacrilegio del que ha sido víctima la dinastía von Valancius.
languages.original_text: The Warrant dais is now empty, a silent testimony to the terrible sacrilege committed against the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: El pedestal de la Patente está vacío, un testimonio silente del espantoso sacrilegio del que ha sido víctima la dinastía von Valancius.

languages.text: L'estrade de la lettre est désormais vide, témoignage silencieux du terrible sacrilège commis à l'encontre de la dynastie von Valancius.
languages.original_text: The Warrant dais is now empty, a silent testimony to the terrible sacrilege committed against the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: L'estrade de la lettre est désormais vide, témoignage silencieux du terrible sacrilège commis à l'encontre de la dynastie von Valancius.

languages.text: Von Valancius hanedanlığına karşı işlenen korkunç saygısızlığın suskun tanığı olan Ruhsatname sergisi artık boş.
languages.original_text: The Warrant dais is now empty, a silent testimony to the terrible sacrilege committed against the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Von Valancius hanedanlığına karşı işlenen korkunç saygısızlığın suskun tanığı olan Ruhsatname sergisi artık boş.

languages.text: Das Podest des Handelsbriefs ist leer, ein stummes Zeugnis des schrecklichen Sakrilegs, das gegen die Dynastie derer von Valancius begangen wurde.
languages.original_text: The Warrant dais is now empty, a silent testimony to the terrible sacrilege committed against the von Valancius dynasty.

traits.locale_text: Das Podest des Handelsbriefs ist leer, ein stummes Zeugnis des schrecklichen Sakrilegs, das gegen die Dynastie derer von Valancius begangen wurde.

languages.text: 今は空っぽの証人。フォン・ヴァランシウス家の歴史を汚した、恐ろしい行為の証。
languages.original_text: The Warrant dais is now empty, a silent testimony to the terrible sacrilege committed against the von Valancius dynasty.
